# infisical_group_machine_identity (Resource)

Add a machine identity as a member of a group. Only Machine Identity authentication is supported for this resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "infisical_group_machine_identity" "example" {
  group_id    = "<group-id>"
  identity_id = "<identity-id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) The ID of the group.
- `identity_id` (String) The ID of the machine identity.
